text:
Yeppers. It’s the worst model right now. When first released, incredible. 

The fact that Claude hasn’t publicly stated this or what they are doing to fix it is not a good look. I’ve switched our dev teams away from Claude to Codex. https://twitter.com/kimmonismus/status/2043052039413100660
